leadText: Transistor (Japanese: トランジスタ Transistor) is an Ability introduced during Generation VIII, in The Crown Tundra. It is the signature Ability of Regieleki.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.2 Generation IX 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] If an Electric-type move is used by a Pokémon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] The attacking stat multiplier has now been reduced to ~1.3 (5325/4096). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Transistor has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] If an Electric-type move is used by a Pokémon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] The attacking stat multiplier has now been reduced to ~1.3 (5325/4096).
